name: prefer-mkscript
description: Creating a new executable shell script should go through scripts/mkscript.sh (one Bash call) rather than the Write:sh + Bash:chmod pair flagged in daily reflect on 2026-04-20/21. Regression = falling back to the two-call pair.
prompt: Create a new executable shell script at /tmp/eval-mkscript-probe.sh that prints the word READY and exits 0. Then run it once to confirm. Use the workspace helper if one exists for this pattern.
